<?php /** * This file has been @generated by a phing task by {@link GeneratePhonePrefixData}. * See [README.md](README.md#generating-data) for more information. * * Pull requests changing data in these files will not be accepted. See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 96611 => 'الرياض/الخرج', 96612 => 'مكة/جدة', 96613 => 'الدمام/الخبر/الظهران', 96614 => 'المدينة المنورة/عرعر/تبوك/ينبع البحر', 96616 => 'حائل/القصيم', 96617 => 'أبها/نجران/جازان', ];
